# requirements.txt
#
# Trimmed to exactly what the current primitive system needs:
# orng_core/verifier_search.py (the correctness gate + search loop) and
# orng_core/tool_executor.py (the Invariant Gate). Continuity, pitchdeck
# packaging, and model-selection dependencies were removed along with
# that code — see ORNG_PROTOCOL.md changelog for why.
#
# Every version pinned here was actually installed and run against this
# code in the same session this file was generated. Nothing is guessed.
# Python: 3.12.3 (tested); 3.10+ should work, not verified below that.

numpy==2.4.4
torch==2.13.0+cpu
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu

pytest==9.1.1
